title: Compounder Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Rug pull on a DeFi protocol with no active defense mechanisms
red_flags: early conversations with admins expressing concerns
security audit stating timelock offers no protection
summary: Compounder.finance was rug pulled, resulting in losses exceeding $12 million. Despite a security audit warning about the lack of protection from the timelock, the protocol was abandoned without any active defense mechanisms.
